description_full: 🎨 Cover: impressionist depiction of a moment from June 06, 1859. Event: Queensland is established as a separate colony from New South Wales. The date is still celebrated as Queensland Day. Quick context: Queensland is a state in northeastern Australia, the second-largest and third-most populous state in Australia. It is bordered by the Northern Territory, South Australia and New S… Trivia: Related: Queensland • Source: Wikipedia (On This Day)
